---
title: SIGNET -- Signed Network Spectral Clustering
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(SIGNET)
```

The $\mathtt{SIGNET}$ package intends to be a user-friendly package implementing a spectral clustering algorithm for signed networks. 

## Features

The package provides functions to 

1. implement signed network clustering;
2. select the number of clusters in a data-driven manner;
3. enable high-dimensional biological network analysis.


## Installation

You can install the $\mathtt{SIGNET}$ package from GitHub with:

```{r install_pkg, eval = FALSE} 
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("zongyue-teng/SIGNET")
```
